steps.expected: 200 with cached:true (cache hit from step 1 or step 2 write-back)

evidence.network: Step 1: GET -> 200 cached:false; Step 2: GET skip_cache=true -> 200 cached:false; Step 3: GET -> 200 cached:true

assertions.title: skip_cache passes through to ypricemagic

steps.expected: Unit test verifying get_price called with skip_cache=True
steps.observed: skip_cache=true is accepted (200) and bypasses server cache (VAL-CORE-007), but internal kwarg forwarding cannot be verified from the API surface

assertions.issues: This assertion explicitly requires unit test evidence ('unit test verifying get_price called with skip_cache=True'). The API surface cannot prove that the skip_cache kwarg is forwarded to ypricemagic's get_price() function — only that the server accepts the parameter and bypasses its own cache. Internal forwarding must be validated via a unit test with mocked get_price.

steps.observed: 400 with {"error":"Invalid skip_cache value: 'maybe'. Must be true, false, 1, or 0."}
400 with {"error":"Invalid silent value: '2'. Must be true, false, 1, or 0."}

evidence.network: GET with two comma-separated pool addresses -> 200

assertions.title: ignore_pools empty string treated as no pools

steps.expected: 200 (empty treated as no pools, not a parse error)

assertions.title: silent=true forwarded to ypricemagic

steps.expected: Unit test verifying silent=True kwarg forwarded to get_price
steps.observed: 200 with price:1.0 — parameter is accepted by the server, but internal kwarg forwarding cannot be verified from the API surface

assertions.issues: This assertion explicitly requires unit test evidence ('unit test verifying silent=True kwarg'). The API surface can only confirm the parameter is accepted without error. Verifying that silent=True is forwarded to ypricemagic's get_price() requires a unit test with mocked get_price checking call kwargs.

frictions.description: Token addresses appear redacted as 42-char asterisks in some responses — this is documented as existing behavior from logger.py but was initially confusing when comparing response.token to request token
frictions.resolution: Known quirk documented in user-testing.md; does not affect validation

blockers.description: VAL-CORE-008 and VAL-CORE-013 require unit test evidence to verify internal function call arguments (skip_cache and silent kwargs forwarded to get_price). This cannot be proven from the API surface alone — requires mocked get_price unit tests.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Confirmed both parameters are accepted by the API (200 response) and skip_cache has observable server-cache-bypass behavior, but internal forwarding to ypricemagic is opaque from curl.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked (VAL-CORE-008 and VAL-CORE-013 require unit test evidence for internal kwarg forwarding that cannot be verified from the API surface).
